goals: Explore the project structure to understand what kind of codebase this is
Find files related to road technology, transportation systems, or traffic infrastructure
Search for specific technical terms related to road or vehicle technology to understand implementation details

user_agent_config.personality: Curious and methodical, approaches new technology with policy-oriented mindset. Prefers structured overviews before diving into details.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Understands transportation policy and road infrastructure concepts but has limited technical coding knowledge. Does not know tool names or internal APIs.

end_condition: The user has explored the codebase structure, identified relevant files related to road/transportation technology, and examined specific technical implementations to inform policy decisions.
